name: Condensed Soup Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
2. Store the mixture in an airtight container.
3. This makes 3 cups of mix, equivalent to about 9 cans of soup.
4. To use: combine 1/3 cup of mix with 1 1/4 cups of water in a saucepan.
5. Cook and stir until thickened.
6. Alternatively, add the mix and water to browned and drained casserole meat and cook in a skillet or saucepan with other casserole ingredients.
7. This mix can also be used instead of canned soup in any casserole recipe.
8. The mix contains about 1/3 the calories and sodium as purchased condensed soup.
